_comment: Singapore Public Holidays and Supreme Court Vacation Periods. Update annually.
_substitutePHNote: When a public holiday falls on a Sunday, the following Monday is a gazetted substitute public holiday (Public Holidays Act s 4). When it falls on a Saturday, the following Monday is typically gazetted as the substitute.
_courtVacationsNote: Supreme Court vacation periods — during these periods, for proceedings in the Supreme Court (General Division and Court of Appeal): (a) for time periods of 14 days or less, vacation days are excluded from the computation (O 2 r 4, ROC 2021); (b) if the last day of ANY period falls within a vacation, it is extended to the first Registry-open day after the vacation. State Courts do NOT have equivalent vacation exclusion rules. Dates below are based on standard patterns — ALWAYS verify current-year dates at https://www.judiciary.gov.sg/civil/court-vacation before relying on them.

2025.name: Chinese New Year Vacation 2025
2025.note: Around Chinese New Year (29–30 Jan 2025). Approximate dates — verify at judiciary.gov.sg.

2025.name: March Vacation 2025
2025.note: Approximate 2-week March vacation. Verify exact dates at judiciary.gov.sg.

2025.name: June/July Vacation 2025
2025.note: Approximate ~4-week long vacation. Verify exact dates at judiciary.gov.sg.

2025.name: September Vacation 2025
2025.note: Approximate 2-week September vacation. Verify exact dates at judiciary.gov.sg.

2025.name: Year-End Vacation 2025
2025.note: Approximate year-end vacation. Verify exact dates at judiciary.gov.sg.
